title: she_rnd: returns SHE_KEY_SZ-typed array for random output, not key material
description: In she.rs, she_rnd returns Result<[u8; SHE_KEY_SZ], Error>. SHE_KEY_SZ is the AES-128 key size (16 bytes), but the output is random data, not a key — the names SHE_KEY_SZ and she_rnd carry mismatched semantics. A reader must know that the SHE PRNG output happens to be 16 bytes (= 1 AES block) to understand why SHE_KEY_SZ is used as the array length. Rewrite: introduce a SHE_RND_SZ: usize = 16 constant (which can equal SHE_KEY_SZ) and use it as the return type annotation: Result<[u8; SHE_RND_SZ], Error>. This makes clear that 16 is the fixed random output size, not incidentally the key size.
